overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a dense forest at night. The player holds a lit torch for the first portion of the clip, which is then extinguished or lowered, plunging the scene into near-total darkness while continuing to walk forward along the dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail illuminated by handheld torch

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the winding forest path while holding a lit torch to illuminate the immediate surroundings

entered.detail: handheld flame providing warm orange illumination and casting dynamic shadows on the path
narrow winding trail covered with dirt, small stones, and patches of grass
dense forest of tall coniferous trees forming a dark wall on the left side
dense forest of tall coniferous trees forming a dark wall on the right side
large boulder or rock outcrop visible among the trees on the right

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view of walking through a dense forest at night. The player holds a torch in their left hand, casting flickering orange light on the dirt path ahead. Tall pine trees line both sides of the narrow trail, creating an enclosed feeling, while a large rock formation is visible to the right. The atmosphere is quiet and isolated with no other characters present.

scene_state.functional_zone: pitch-black forest trail after light source extinguished

events.description: torch is extinguished or lowered, drastically reducing visibility and plunging the scene into near-total darkness

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward through the now pitch-black forest, navigating by the faint ambient light and memory of the path

segments.scene_description: As the torch disappears, the scene transitions to near-total darkness. The player continues walking forward along the forest path, now only able to see faint silhouettes of tree trunks against the slightly lighter night sky and the dim outline of the dirt trail directly ahead. The atmosphere becomes significantly more ominous as visibility drops to just a few meters.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dense nocturnal forest that shifts from a torch-lit trek to a plunge into near-total darkness. It begins with the camera moving along a narrow dirt path, where a torch held in the left hand casts flickering orange light upon the trail and a large rock formation to the right. As the player continues forward through the enclosed corridor of tall pine trees, the torch suddenly disappears, causing the warm illumination to vanish. The scene then transitions into an ominous void where visibility drops to a few meters, leaving only the faint silhouettes of tree trunks against a dim night sky. Finally, the camera pushes forward into the gloom, guided only by the vague outline of the dirt trail ahead.
